description: A hearty bibimbap centered on noodles, rice, or pasta and shaped by sauce, broth, or seasoning.

health_advice.benefits: Can be satisfying and enjoyable while offering energy and meal variety.
health_advice.risks: Rich toppings, frying, or oversized portions can make the dish heavier than expected.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Aim for balanced portions, lighter add-ons, and more vegetables where possible.

dietary_notes.note: Broth, sauce, and protein choices determine the final dietary profile
